expectations.text: A1: @tc annotations — every it() has @tc JSDoc block
expectations.evidence: All 7 it() blocks have @tc.name/@tc.desc/@tc.type JSDoc annotations

expectations.text: A2: Hypium imports — from @ohos/hypium with describe/it/expect
expectations.evidence: Line 17: import { describe, it, expect, TestType, Size, Level } from '@ohos/hypium'

expectations.text: A3: Correct C API header include in NapiTest.cpp
expectations.evidence: Line 19: #include <zlib.h>

expectations.text: A4: Error handling — uses napi_throw_error or proper error patterns
expectations.evidence: Extensive napi_throw_error usage: lines 57, 64, 71, 79, 89, 99, 106, etc. with input validation and specific error codes (e.g. '-5' for Z_BUF_ERROR)

expectations.text: A5: No BUILD.gn modifications to existing projects
expectations.evidence: New project created (ActsZlibCapiApiTest/)

expectations.text: A6: Test design doc (.design.md) exists with SUB_ IDs, test steps, expected results, and coverage stats
expectations.evidence: ZlibCompressTest.test.ets.design.md (146 lines) with 7 test cases using SUB_ZLIB_* IDs, detailed steps, expected results, coverage statistics

expectations.text: A7: Valid C++ and ArkTS syntax
expectations.evidence: Both files have syntactically valid code

expectations.text: A8: Cleanup/afterAll present with state restoration
expectations.evidence: No afterAll or beforeAll hook in ZlibCompressTest.test.ets; no cleanup present

expectations.text: A9: API-only usage — only C APIs from header are called
expectations.evidence: Only compress, uncompress, compressBound from zlib.h are called

expectations.text: A10: Describe block naming
expectations.evidence: describe('ZlibCompressTest', () => {...})

expectations.text: C1: THREE code artifacts — NapiTest.cpp + index.d.ts + .test.ets
expectations.evidence: All three files present in full project structure

expectations.text: C2: napi_property_descriptor registration in Init
expectations.evidence: Lines 389-400: desc[] with 7 entries, napi_define_properties() call

expectations.text: C3: index.d.ts export const matches desc[]
expectations.evidence: 7 exports in index.d.ts match 7 entries in desc[]

expectations.text: C4: ETS imports from libentry.so (or correct native module)
expectations.evidence: Line 18: import testNapi from 'libentry.so' matches nm_modname 'entry'

expectations.text: C5: SUB_ test naming convention
expectations.evidence: it() names are 'Compress_NormalData', 'Compress_EmptyData', etc. — no SUB_ prefix in actual it() identifiers

expectations.text: C6: TestType/Size/Level decorators
expectations.evidence: All it() calls use TestType.FUNCTION | Size.MEDIUMTEST | Level.LEVEL*

expectations.text: F1: Design doc has coverage statistics table (API x Type matrix)
expectations.evidence: Lines 138-145: Coverage table with compress/uncompress/compressBound x PARAM/ERROR/RETURN/BOUNDARY

expectations.text: F2: Design doc has N-API function name mapping for each test case
expectations.evidence: Each test case has 'N-API 函数名' field, e.g. compressNormalData, uncompressRoundTrip, compressBoundZeroLength

expectations.text: F3: Design doc test case IDs match actual .test.ets test case IDs (>=50% match)
expectations.evidence: Design doc IDs are SUB_ZLIB_* but actual it() names are different (e.g. 'Compress_NormalData'). 0% match rate

expectations.text: F4: Design doc has detailed test steps (not vague)
expectations.evidence: Each test case has specific steps with function calls and parameters, e.g. '编码字符串为 ArrayBuffer → 调用 testNapi.compressNormalData(arrayBuffer) → 获取返回的压缩后 ArrayBuffer'
